title: Dark Cinematic Orchestral
prompt:
[Intro]
epic orchestral, dark ambient, cinematic, full orchestra
[Verse]
strings swell, brass fanfare, ominous low brass, timpani hits
[Chorus]
epic choir, dramatic crescendo, cinematic climax, 8-bit inspired motif
[Bridge]
silence, then single piano note, strings re-enter softly
[Outro]
full orchestral swell, fade to silence

title: Neon City Lo-fi Beats
prompt:
[Intro]
lo-fi hip hop, rainy night, vinyl crackle, mellow piano
[Verse]
lazy boom bap drums, jazzy chords, dusty samples, muted trumpet
[Chorus]
chill vibes, soft bass groove, atmospheric pads, late night feel
[Bridge]
rain sounds, vinyl noise, brief melody break
[Outro]
fade out, vinyl crackle returns

title: Synthwave Midnight Drive
prompt:
[Intro]
synthwave, retrowave, 80s aesthetic, analog synths, drum machine
[Verse]
arpeggiated synth, four-on-the-floor kick, gated reverb snare, bass synth
[Chorus]
neon glow vibes, lead synth melody, chorus effect on guitar, driving beat
[Bridge]
synth solo, pitch bend, analog filter sweep
[Outro]
echo and reverb tail, distant synthesizer fade

title: Melancholic Russian Romance
prompt:
[Intro]
russian romance ballad, melancholic, acoustic guitar, soft strings
[Verse]
gentle fingerpicking, breathy female vocal, minor key, bittersweet
[Chorus]
string quartet joins, emotional swell, heartbreak theme, poetic lyrics
[Bridge]
piano solo, single melody line, contemplative
[Outro]
voice fades, acoustic guitar alone

title: Trap Anthem Banger
prompt:
[Intro]
trap, hip-hop anthem, 808 bass, hi-hat rolls, dark melodic
[Verse]
thick 808s, rapid hi-hats, vocal chops, dark minor piano
[Chorus]
drop, bass slam, crowd energy, anthemic hook, distorted 808
[Verse 2]
layered synths, trap percussion, ad-libs, menacing atmosphere
[Bridge]
half-time breakdown, 808 slide, reverse cymbal
[Outro]
build up, final drop, fade

title: Smooth Jazz Evening
prompt:
[Intro]
smooth jazz, late evening, cocktail lounge, upright bass, brushed drums
[Verse]
cool piano chords, muted trumpet, walking bass line, jazz swing
[Chorus]
saxophone lead, warm tone, effortless improvisation, mellow groove
[Bridge]
double bass solo, sparse, intimate
[Outro]
all instruments fade one by one, final piano chord resolves

title: Indie Pop Summer Crush
prompt:
[Intro]
indie pop, summery, jangly guitar, carefree, upbeat
[Verse]
arcadian guitar riff, clap percussion, light synth pads, warm vocal
[Chorus]
catchy hook, layered vocals, driving rhythm, feel-good energy
[Post-Chorus]
oh-oh-oh vocals, melodic guitar lick, sunshine
[Bridge]
breakdown to just guitar and voice, intimate
[Outro]
full band returns, big finish, fade out

title: Heavy Metal Fury
prompt:
[Intro]
heavy metal, thrash, distorted guitars, double kick drums, aggressive
[Verse]
powerful riff, palm-muted chugs, screaming vocals, relentless tempo
[Chorus]
chorus explosion, guitar harmonies, gang vocals, headbang moment
[Guitar Solo]
shredding guitar solo, sweep picking, whammy bar dive
[Bridge]
half-time breakdown, sludgy riff, building tension
[Outro]
full tempo return, ending with final chord feedback

title: Ambient Space Journey
prompt:
[Intro]
ambient, space, atmospheric, ethereal pads, cosmic
[Development]
evolving texture, slow filter sweep, distant stars feel, reverb ocean
[Mid-section]
single synth melody, sparse, contemplative, weightless
[Climax]
layers build, harmonic overtones, vast and infinite
[Resolution]
all layers dissolve slowly, deep reverb tail, silence

title: Spanish Flamenco Passion
prompt:
[Intro]
flamenco, passionate, acoustic spanish guitar, hand claps, cajon
[Verse]
fingerstyle guitar rapid runs, zapateado rhythm, soulful vocal wail
[Chorus]
full ensemble, jaleo shouts, passionate, emotional peak
[Guitar Solo]
virtuoso guitar solo, tremolo picking, expressive bends
[Outro]
slowing tempo, final chord with resonance, silence

title: Future Bass Euphoria
prompt:
[Intro]
future bass, euphoric, supersaws, emotional, festival
[Build]
arpeggiated synth, snare roll, riser, anticipation building
[Drop]
massive supersaw chords, wobble bass, emotional lead, crowd euphoria
[Verse]
downtempo groove, melodic vocal chops, introspective
[Build 2]
tension builds again, filtered pads
[Drop 2]
even bigger drop, pitch-shifted chords, full frequency spectrum
[Outro]
fade with reverb tail

title: Acoustic Folk Campfire
prompt:
[Intro]
acoustic folk, campfire, storytelling, fingerpicked guitar, warm
[Verse]
calloused fingers on steel strings, honest voice, gravel and warmth
[Chorus]
harmonized chorus, simple and true, hands clapping, foot tapping
[Verse 2]
second story verse, fiddle joins, banjo accent
[Bridge]
all instruments quiet, voice alone, moment of truth
[Outro]
everyone joins for final chorus, fade into night sounds

title: Japanese City Pop Groove
prompt:
[Intro]
city pop, japanese, 80s, funky bass, lush production
[Verse]

[Pre-Chorus]
building tension, synth fills, anticipation
[Chorus]
catchy melodic hook, layered harmonies, summery feel, sophisticated groove
[Guitar Solo]
silky smooth guitar solo, chorus effect, melodic phrasing
[Outro]
repeating groove, vocal ad-libs, fade into night

title: Phonk Drift Racing
prompt:

phonk, drift, memphis rap influence, chopped vocals, cowbell
[Verse]

[Chorus]

[Verse 2]

[Bridge]
break, single 808 pulse, tension
[Outro]
full phonk elements return, fade with reverb

title: Neo-Soul Late Night
prompt:

neo-soul, late night, warm, organic, live band feel

[Chorus]
full soul expression, melismatic vocal runs, horn accent
[Bridge]

[Outro]
repeating groove, improvised vocal outro, fade

title: Epic Viking Battle
prompt:

viking metal, epic, war drums, Norse folk instruments, massive
[Verse]

[Chorus]

[Outro]
grand finale, full orchestra and metal band, fading war drums

title: Dark Trap Soul
prompt:

dark trap soul, emotional, melodic, introspective

title: Tropical House Sunrise
prompt:

tropical house, sunrise, beach, steel drums, organic elements

[Drop]

[Verse 2]

[Final Drop]
bigger production, uplifting, full summer feeling
[Outro]

title: Indie Rock Nostalgia
prompt:

indie rock, nostalgic, 90s inspired, jangly guitars, honest
[Verse]
